Throwing Mastery.name: Maîtrise du lancer
Throwing Mastery.description:
You've mastered the techniques of throwing weapons, readily blending the weapons with your movements. You gain the following benefits:

  • Attacking at long range doesn't impose disavantage on your attaque d'arme à distance rolls with thrown weapons.
  • Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque à distance with a thrown weapon, you have avantage on your next attaque d'arme au corps à corps against cette créature before the end of your next turn.
  • Une fois par tour, you can draw a thrown weapon without using your object interaction.
  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, you can make a attaque d'arme à distance with a thrown weapon against a target within the weapon's normal range without the aid of your bonus de maîtrise (no action required).

Covert Mastery.name: Maîtrise secrète
Covert Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting from unseen angles, gaining an avantage over your foes. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can try to hide when you are lightly obscured from la créature from which you are hiding.
  • Dim light doesn't impose disavantage on your Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
  • When you are hidden from a creature and miss it with an unarmed strike or attaque d'arme, making the attack doesn't automatically reveal your position.
  • Une fois par tour, when you deal dégâts to a creature with an unarmed strike or attaque d'arme while hidden from it, you deal additional dégâts equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Defense Mastery.name: Maîtrise de la défense
Defense Mastery.description:
You've mastered the art of defending yourpersonnelle, treating your armor as a second skin. You gain the following benefits:

  • While you are wearing medium or heavy armor with which you are proficient, when a creature makes a attaque au corps à corps against you while within your reach, whether the attack hits or misses, you can use your réaction to attempt to shove cette créature up to 10 mètres directly away from you.
  • The time it takes for you to don and doff armor is reduced by half.
  • While you are wearing medium or heavy armor with which you are proficient, dégâts that you take from weapons is reduced by an amount equal to your bonus de maîtrise. If this would reduce the dégâts to 0, the dégâts is instead reduced to 1.

Gunning Mastery.name: Maîtrise du tir
Gunning Mastery.description:
You've mastered using blasters in unique ways, controlling the battlefield. You gain the following benefits:

  • When a creature succeeds on the jet de sauvegarde against the burst or rapid property of your weapon, they take dégâts equal to the weapon's governing modificateur de caractéristique.
  • You treat the strength number of weapons as one step lower (19 to 17, 17 to 15, 15 to 13, or 13 to 11). If the strength number is 11, you ignore it entirely.
  • When you use the burst property of a weapon, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise to the sauvegarde DD. If you do so, chaque créature that fails the sauvegarde takes additional dégâts equal to your bonus de maîtrise.
  • When you use the rapid property of a weapon, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise to the sauvegarde DD. If you do so, and la cible fails the sauvegarde, they take additional dégâts equal to twice your bonus de maîtrise.

Formation Mastery.name: Maîtrise des formations
Formation Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting with a partner, learning to move and act as a single unit. You gain the following benefits:

  • When you take the Guard action, the guarded ally has avantage on Dexterity jet de sauvegardes that would affect only them while guarded.
  • When a creature misses an ally within 5 mètres of you with a attaque d'arme, you can use your réaction to make a attaque d'arme against cette créature without your bonus de maîtrise.
  • When a creature hits an ally within 5 mètres of you with a attaque d'arme, you can use your réaction to impose a penalty to the attack roll equal to your bonus de maîtrise, potentially causing the attack to miss.

Blindfighting Mastery.name: Maîtrise du combat à l'aveugle
Blindfighting Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting without sight, finding a home in the darkness that your enemies fear. You gain the following benefits:

  • Once per round, when a creature would have disavantage on an attack roll against you due to being aveuglé, they must reroll one of the dice once.
  • Once per round, when you would have avantage on an attack roll against a creature that is aveuglé, you can reroll one of the dice once.
  • You gain blindsight out to a number of mètres equal to 5 x your bonus de maîtrise. If you already have blindsight, it instead increases by a number of mètres equal to 5 x your bonus de maîtrise.

Formfighting Mastery.name: Maîtrise du combat de formes
Formfighting Mastery.description:
Prerequisite: The ability to cast pouvoir de la Forces

You've mastered the basics of the known forms of lightsaber combat, wielding your weapon with unparalleled grace. You gain the following benefits:

  • You learn three lightsaber forms, detailed later in this chapter. If you already know at least three lightsaber forms, you instead learn seven lightsaber forms.
  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, before you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If you do so, you can engage in one of your lightsaber forms without using your action bonus. If that form lets you make an attack, that attack is also made without your bonus de maîtrise.
  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, before you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If you do so, and the attack hits, vous pouvez choisir another creature within 5 mètres of it. If the original attack roll would hit the second creature, it takes dégâts of the weapon's type equal to twice your bonus de maîtrise.

Secured Mastery.name: Maîtrise sécurisée
Secured Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting with weapons in atypical places, seamlessly transitioning between your armaments. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can wield a number of items on each forearm equal to your full Strength modificateur, instead of half.
  • You can now reload fixed weapons using your réaction or object interaction, instead of just your action or action bonus. If you could already reload the weapon using your réaction or object interaction, une fois par chacun de vos tours, you can instead reload the weapon (no action required). You must have one free hand to reload.
  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, when you miss an attack with a weapon that lacks the fixed property, you can make an additional attack against the same target with a fixed weapon without the aid of your bonus de maîtrise (no action required).
  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, when you would make a attaque d'arme with a fixed weapon, you can forgo the attack. If you do so, you can add your bonus de maîtrise to your AC against one attack that would hit you before the start of your next turn (no action required).

Versatile Mastery.name: Maîtrise polyvalente
Versatile Mastery.description:
You've mastered using weapons in different ways, altering your attack patterns mid-swing. You gain the following benefits:

  • Une fois par tour, quand vous faites a attaque au corps à corps roll while wielding a weapon in two hands, you can attempt to follow up on the attack. If the attack hits, la créature must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon). On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is pushed back 5 mètres, and you can immediately move into the space it just vacated without provoking attaque d'opportunités.
  • Une fois par tour, quand vous faites a attaque au corps à corps roll while wielding a weapon in one hand, la cible is wielding a shield, and your other hand is empty, you can use your other hand to pull down the shield (no action required). If you do so, la créature gains no benefit to classe d'armure from its shield for that attack.
  • Before you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps while wielding a versatile weapon in two hands, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If the attack hits, you add one and a half times your bonus de maîtrise to the attack's dégâts.
  • Before you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps while wielding a versatile weapon in one hand, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If the attack hits, you add your bonus de maîtrise to the attack's dégâts.

Sharpshooter Mastery.name: Maîtrise du tireur d'élite
Sharpshooter Mastery.description:
You've mastered blaster weapons and can easily make shots that others find impossible. You gain the following benefits:

  • Attacking at long range doesn't impose disavantage on your attaque d'arme à distance rolls.
  • Your attaque d'arme à distances reduce partial cover by one step (from three-quarters to half or half to one-quarter) against targets greater than 30 mètres from you. If la cible has one-quarter cover, you ignore it entirely.
  • Before you make an attack against a target greater than 30 mètres from you with a blaster weapon with which you are proficient, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If the attack hits, you add twice your bonus de maîtrise to the attack's dégâts.

Duelist Mastery.name: Maîtrise du duelliste
Duelist Mastery.description:
You've mastered the art of fighting with a single weapon, making one weapon feel like many. You gain the following benefits:

  • You have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed.
  • While you are wielding a weapon in one hand with which you are proficient and no other weapons, when you take the Attack action, vous pouvez choisir to attack with haste at the expense of accuracy. Your attaque d'arme is made without the aid of your bonus de maîtrise, but you can use your réaction to make an additional attaque d'arme, also without your bonus de maîtrise. If you would make more than one attack when you take the Attack action, only one attack is made without your bonus de maîtrise.
  • While you are wielding a weapon in one hand with which you are proficient and no other weapons, when a creature hits you with a attaque au corps à corps, you can use your réaction to add your bonus de maîtrise to your AC for that attack, potentially causing the attack to miss you.

Brawler Mastery.name: Maîtrise du bagarreur
Brawler Mastery.description:
You've mastered using your weight to your avantage, easily wrangling targets around. You gain the following benefits:

  • Your improvised weapons use a [[/r d6]] for dégâts and gain the versatile ([[/r 2d4]]) property.
  • Your dégâts die for your unarmed strikes and natural weapons increases by one step (from 1 to [[/r d4]], [[/r d4]] to [[/r d6]], or [[/r d6]] to [[/r d8]]).
  • Your speed isn't halved by carrying a agrippé creature who is the same size category as you or smaller.
  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, quand vous contactez a creature with an unarmed strike or a weapon wielded in one hand on your turn, you can make an additional unarmed strike against the same target without the aid of your bonus de maîtrise (no action required).

Dual Wield Mastery.name: Maîtrise à double usage
Dual Wield Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting with two weapons, becoming a flurry of motion. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can engage in Two-Weapon Fighting even when the weapons you are wielding lack the light property.
  • You can reload two weapons when you would normally only be able to reload one, and reloading no longer requires a free hand, provided you are wielding separate weapons in each hand.
  • Once per round, quand vous faites an attaque d'opportunité while wielding separate weapons in each hand, you can attack with both weapons. Make a separate attack roll with each weapon.
  • When you use your action bonus to engage in Two-Weapon Fighting, vous pouvez choisir to forgo one or more attacks. For each attack you forgo, you gain a +1 bonus to AC jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.
  • When you use your action bonus to engage in Two-Weapon Fighting, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If you do so, you can make an additional attack with that weapon, also without your bonus de maîtrise. If you would normally make more than one attack with your action bonus, only one attack is made without your bonus de maîtrise.

Shield Mastery.name: Maîtrise du bouclier
Shield Mastery.description:
You've mastered using a shield to defend your allies as well as yourpersonnelle, strategically imposing your shield to capitalize on its protection. You gain the following benefits:

  • If you aren't incapacitated, you can add your shield's AC bonus to any Dexterity jet de sauvegarde you make against a power or other harmful effect.
  • While you are wielding a shield with which you are proficient, when you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde to take only half dégâts, and you succeed on the jet de sauvegarde, you can use your réaction to take no dégâts.
  • When a creature you can see dégâtss you while you are wielding a shield with which you are proficient, you can use your réaction to reduce the dégâts by an amount equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Berserk Mastery.name: Maîtrise Berserker
Berserk Mastery.description:
You've mastered returning pain to those who deliver it, becoming a scourge on the battlefield. You gain the following benefits:

  • When a creature scores a critical hit against you, you have avantage on the first attack you make against cette créature before the end of your next turn. If you would already have avantage, you can instead reroll one of the dice once.
  • You have avantage on jet de sauvegardes that would force you to act against your will, be effrayé, or prevent you from attacking a creature.
  • When a creature within 5 mètres of you deals dégâts to you with a weapon or unarmed strike, you can use your réaction to make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps or unarmed strike against cette créature. En cas de contacter, you deal additional dégâts equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Explosives Mastery.name: Maîtrise des explosifs
Explosives Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting with explosives, causing untold destruction. You gain the following benefits:

  • When determining the sauvegarde DD of a grenade, mine, or missile you control, you can use 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur, if it would be higher than the item's DD.
  • You have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against grenades, mines, and missiles you control.
  • When using a grenade, mine, or missile that requires a jet de sauvegarde and deals dégâts, you can take a penalty to the sauvegarde DD equal to your bonus de maîtrise. If you do so, the item's dégâts increases by an amount equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Counterstrike Mastery.name: Maîtrise de la contre-attaque
Counterstrike Mastery.description:
You've mastered returning attacks at those who dare strike you, effortless turning aside their blades while striking them with your own. You gain the following benefits:

  • Creatures have disavantage on jet de dégâtss from attaque d'opportunités they make that hit you, and you have avantage on jet de dégâts for attaque d'opportunités you make that hit.
  • When you roll a die to reduce the dégâts you take from a weapon, you have avantage on the die roll.
  • Once per round, when a creature provokes an attaque d'opportunité from you, vous pouvez choisir to gain a special réaction which you can only use to make that attaque d'opportunité. If you do so, you make the attaque d'opportunité without the aid of your bonus de maîtrise.
  • When you would be la cible of a attaque d'arme, you can immediately use your réaction to make an attaque d'opportunité against la cible without your bonus de maîtrise. En cas de contacter, la cible suffers the attack's normal effects, and you impose disavantage on the triggering roll.

Assisting Mastery.name: Maîtrise de l'assistance
Assisting Mastery.description:
You've mastered enabling your allies, boosting them to the dismay of your enemies. You gain the following benefits:

  • When you take the Help action and target an ally, vous pouvez choisir to forgo up to half your speed. If you do so, when that ally makes its test de caractéristique to complete the task with avantage, it can reroll one of the dice once. You can not use this feature if you have moved more than half your speed this turn.
  • When you take the Help action and target an enemy, vous pouvez choisir to forgo up to half your speed. If you do so, when an ally makes its attack roll against la créature with avantage, it can reroll one of the dice once. You can not use this feature if you have moved more than half your speed this turn.
  • When you take the Help action, it has a range in mètres equal to 5 x your bonus de maîtrise.

Spotting Mastery.name: Maîtrise du repérage
Spotting Mastery.description:
You've mastered keeping track of your surroundings, noticing things in detail that others miss entirely. You gain the following benefits:

  • You no longer have disavantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks due to an area being lightly obscured in a 120 foot range.
  • When a creature rolls a [[/r d20]] to redirect an attack roll you make to an illusory duplicate, they have disavantage on the roll.
  • When you take the Search action, you give off no indication that you are devoting your attention to finding something.
  • When you find a hidden creature using the Search action, it has disavantage on any test de caractéristiques it makes to attempt Hide from you before the start of your next turn.
  • When you take the Search action, you have avantage on all test de caractéristiques, attack rolls, and jet de sauvegardes made as a part of that search that occur within a radius in mètres equal to 5 x your bonus de maîtrise.

Twin-Blade Mastery.name: Maîtrise des doubles lames
Twin-Blade Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting with double-bladed weapons, using both ends to devastating effect. You gain the following benefits:

  • While you are wielding a double weapon with which you are proficient, whenever you roll the maximum on a weapon dégâts die against a creature, you gain a +1 bonus to the next attack roll you make against cette créature before the end of your next turn.
  • You can engage in Double-Weapon Fighting even when the weapon you are wielding lacks the light property.
  • Before you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps while wielding a double weapon in two hands, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If the attack hits, you add one and a half times your bonus de maîtrise to the attack's dégâts.
  • Before you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps while wielding a double weapon in one hand, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If the attack hits, you add your bonus de maîtrise to the attack's dégâts.

Sentinel Mastery.name: Maîtrise des Sentinelles
Sentinel Mastery.description:
You've mastered techniques to take avantage of every drop in any enemy's guard; in tight spaces you are indomitable. You gain the following benefits:

  • Creatures within your reach provoke attaque d'opportunités from you even if they take the Disengage action.
  • When you take the Dodge action, once per round, you can take two réactions on the same turn, instead of only one. You can only take one réaction per trigger.
  • You can use a action bonus to enter a defensive stance that lasts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. While in your defensive stance, you have a number of special réactions equal to your bonus de maîtrise that you can only use to make attaque d'opportunités.

Disruption Mastery.name: Maîtrise des perturbations
Disruption Mastery.description:
Choose one from force- or tech-casting. You've mastered fighting and interfering with casters of the chosen type, confounding their concentration. You gain the following benefits:

  • When a creature within 30 mètres of you that you can see casts a power, they provoke an attaque d'opportunité from you.
  • You have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against powers cast by creatures you can see if you've dealt dégâts to them since the start of your last turn.
  • Whenever you force a creature to make a jet de sauvegarde to maintain concentration, the DD for the jet de sauvegarde increases by an amount equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Superiority Mastery.name: Maîtrise de la supériorité
Superiority Mastery.description:
You've mastered utilizing maneuvers to enhance your skills on the battlefield, expanded. You gain the following benefits:

  • You learn one maneuver, detailed in Chapter 13. If you already know at least one maneuver, you instead learn three maneuvers. Your maneuver ability is Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution for physical maneuvers (your choice), your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma for mental maneuvers (your choice), and an ability de votre choix for general maneuvers.
  • You gain one dé de supériorité. If you already have at least one dé de supériorité, you instead gain two additional dés de supériorité. Your dé de supériorité is a [[/r d4]], and it changes as you gain niveaus: to [[/r d6]] at niveau 5, to [[/r d8]] at niveau 9, to [[/r d10]] at niveau 13, and to [[/r d12]] at niveau 17. A dé de supériorité is expended quand vous utilisez it. Vous regagnez tous of your expended dés de supériorité when you finish a short or repos long.
  • When you use a maneuver on your turn that involves rolling a dé de supériorité, you can use your action bonus to gain avantage on the dé de supériorité roll.
  • Choose one maneuver you know. When you would use the chosen maneuver, you can use a [[/r d4]] instead of expending a dé de supériorité. You can do so un nombre de fois égal à your bonus de maîtrise. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

Mounted Mastery.name: Maîtrise montée
Mounted Mastery.description:
You've mastered the art of fighting while mounted, moving seamlessly with your companion. You gain the following benefits:

  • If your mount is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde to take only half dégâts, you can use your réaction to have it instead take no dégâts if it succeeds on the jet de sauvegarde, and only half dégâts if it fails.
  • While mounted on a controlled beast, you can use your action bonus to have your mount make a single attaque au corps à corps against a creature within its reach. If you could already use your action bonus to have your mount make an attack, you can instead do so as a réaction on your turn.
  • While mounted on a vehicle, you can take a vehicle action with your action bonus, instead of your action. If you could already take a vehicle action as a action bonus, you can instead do so as a réaction on your turn. You can't take the same action twice in one turn.
  • Une fois par tour, vous pouvez choisir to have avantage on a attaque d'arme au corps à corps roll against an unmounted creature that is smaller than your mount. If the attack hits, you deal additional dégâts equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Great Weapon Mastery.name: Grande maîtrise des armes
Great Weapon Mastery.description:
You've mastered putting the weight of a weapon to your avantage, letting its momentum empower your strikes. You gain the following benefits:

  • On your turn, when you score a critical hit or reduce a creature to 0 points de vie with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can make one attaque d'arme au corps à corps as a action bonus.
  • While you are wielding a two-handed light- or vibro-weapon with which you are proficient, when you miss with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can use your action bonus to repeat the attack against the same target. Any modifications to the original attack roll, such as avantage, disavantage, or without your bonus de maîtrise, also affect this attack roll. En cas de contacter, this attack deals kinetic dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur.
  • You have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed.
  • While you are wielding a two-handed light- or vibro-weapon with which you are proficient, before you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If the attack hits, you add twice your bonus de maîtrise to the attack's dégâts.

Onslaught Mastery.name: Maîtrise de l'assaut
Onslaught Mastery.description:
You've mastered using your momentum to your avantage, effectively pummeling creatures into submission and keeping them down once they fall. You gain the following benefits:

  • When a creature falls à terre within 5 mètres of you, they provoke an attaque d'opportunité from you.
  • When you would have avantage on a attaque d'arme au corps à corps due to a creature being à terre, you can reroll one of the dice once.
  • When a à terre creature within 5 mètres of you attempts to stand, they provoke an attaque d'opportunité from you.
  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, if you move at least 10 mètres in a straight line towards a creature immediately before hitting it with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can deal additional dégâts equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Snapshot Mastery.name: Maîtrise des instantanés
Snapshot Mastery.description:
You've mastered getting up close and personal with blaster weapons, maintaining both rate of fire and accuracy. You gain the following benefits:

  • Your attaque d'arme à distances reduce partial cover by one step (from three-quarters to half or half to one-quarter) against targets within 30 mètres of you. If la cible has one-quarter cover, you ignore it entirely.
  • Other creatures provoke an attaque d'opportunité from you when they move to within 30 mètres of you, and you can make attaque d'arme à distances with blaster weapons when making attaque d'opportunités.
  • When you take the Attack action targeting a creature within 30 mètres while you are wielding a blaster weapon with which you are proficient, vous pouvez choisir to attack rapidly at the expense of accuracy. Your attaque d'arme à distance is made without the aid of your bonus de maîtrise, but you can use your action bonus to make an additional attaque d'arme à distance, also without your bonus de maîtrise. If you would make more than one attack when you take the Attack action, only one attack is made without your bonus de maîtrise.

Area Mastery.name: Maîtrise de zone
Area Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting with weapons that affect an area, easily overwhelming your foe's defenses. You gain the following benefits:

  • When determining the sauvegarde DD of a projector canister you control, you can use 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur, if it would be higher than the item's DD.
  • Your projector canisters reduce partial cover by one step (from three-quarters to half or half to one-quarter). If a creature has one-quarter cover, you ignore it entirely.
  • When using a projector canister that requires a jet de sauvegarde and deals dégâts, you can take a penalty to the sauvegarde DD equal to your bonus de maîtrise. If you do so, the item's dégâts increases by an amount equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

Split Mastery.name: Maîtrise partagée
Split Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting with interlocking weapons, seamlessly transitioning between twin blades and dual wielding. You gain the following benefits:

  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, detaching or reattaching your interlocking weapon no longer requires your object interaction.
  • You can engage in Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting even when the weapons you are wielding lack the light property.
  • Before you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps while you are wielding separate weapons in each hand with which you are proficient, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If the attack hits, you add your bonus de maîtrise to the attack's dégâts.
  • When you use your action bonus to engage in Double-Weapon Fighting, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your bonus de maîtrise. If you do so, you can make an additional attack with that weapon, also without your bonus de maîtrise. If you would normally make more than one attack with your action bonus, only one attack is made without your bonus de maîtrise.

Poisoner Mastery.name: Maîtrise de l'empoisonneur
Poisoner Mastery.description:
You are skilled at with the subtlety of poisons, causing untold destruction. You gain the following benefits:

  • When determining the sauvegarde DD of a poison you control, you can use 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur, if it would be higher than the item's DD.
  • When you apply a poison to a weapon or ammunition, that poison can affect an additional hit or an additional piece of ammunition.
  • Creatures suffering from the empoisonné condition have disavantage on jet de sauvegardes against poisons you control.
  • When using a poison that requires a jet de sauvegarde and deals dégâts, you can take a penalty to the sauvegarde DD equal to your bonus de maîtrise. If you do so, the item's dégâts increases by an amount equal to twice your bonus de maîtrise.

Equilibrium Mastery.name: Maîtrise de l'équilibre
Equilibrium Mastery.description:
You've mastered fighting without the confines of armor, treating combat as an elegant dance. You gain the following benefits:

  • If you are disarmed, you can use your réaction to immediately catch the weapon.
  • While you are wearing light or no armor and not wielding a shield, when a creature misses you with a attaque d'arme, you can use your réaction to make an unarmed strike or attaque d'arme against cette créature without your bonus de maîtrise.
  • While you are wearing light or no armor and not wielding a shield, when a creature hits you with a attaque d'arme, you can use your réaction to impose a penalty to the attack roll equal to your bonus de maîtrise, potentially causing the attack to miss.

Guerrilla Mastery.name: Maîtrise de la guérilla
Guerrilla Mastery.description:
You've mastered maneuvering across the battlefield, sliding through openings that others might not see. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can move through a hostile creature's space regardless of cette créature's size.
  • Quand vous contactez une créature with an attaque d'opportunité, you can move up to half your speed (no action required) without provoking attaque d'opportunités from cette créature.
  • When a hostile creature moves to within 5 mètres of you, you can use your réaction to Disengage and move up to half your speed.
  • Une fois par tour, quand vous contactez a creature with a attaque d'arme, another enemy of la créature is within 5 mètres of it, and that enemy isn't incapacitated, you can deal additional dégâts equal to twice your bonus de maîtrise.
